# Inferno Protocol ($IFR)

> Deflationary ERC-20 utility token on Ethereum Mainnet. Every transfer burns 2.5% permanently.

## What is IFR?

Inferno ($IFR) is a deflationary ERC-20 utility token deployed on Ethereum Mainnet. Every transfer permanently burns 2.5% of the transferred amount (2% sender burn + 0.5% recipient burn), plus a 1% pool fee routed to protocol contracts. Supply can only decrease, never increase — there is no mint function. Users lock IFR tokens on-chain to unlock lifetime premium access to builder products, with no subscriptions or recurring payments.

## Key Facts

- Token Contract: 0x77e99917Eca8539c62F509ED1193ac36580A6e7B (Ethereum Mainnet)
- Genesis Supply: 1,000,000,000 IFR (1 Billion)
- Current Supply: ~998,500,000 IFR (~1.5M burned)
- Decimals: 9
- Burn Rate: 2.5% per transfer (permanent)
- Pool Fee: 1.0% per transfer (to protocol)
- Total Fee: 3.5% (hard cap: 5.0%)
- Governance: 48-hour timelock, no instant changes
- Multisig: All Safes 3-of-5 (5 independent signers)
- Bootstrap Event: ACTIVE (March 7 - June 5, 2026), 200M IFR + ETH contributions
- LP Reserve: 400,600,000 IFR secured in Gnosis Safe 3-of-5
- Team Tokens: 150M IFR, 12-month cliff + 36-month linear vesting (0 available before March 2027)
- Fair Launch: No presale, no VC, no private sale

## Token Distribution

- LP Reserve Safe: 400,600,000 IFR (40.06%) — Gnosis Safe 3-of-5
- BootstrapVaultV3: 200,000,000 IFR (20%) — Community price discovery
- LiquidityReserve: 200,000,000 IFR (20%) — Locked until September 2026
- Vesting (Team): 150,000,000 IFR (15%) — 12-month cliff, 4-year linear
- PartnerVault: 40,000,000 IFR (4%) — Governance-locked builder rewards
- Community Safe: 7,900,000 IFR (0.79%) — Operations reserve
- Burned: ~1,500,000 IFR — Permanent deflation

## Smart Contracts (all verified on Etherscan)

- InfernoToken: 0x77e99917Eca8539c62F509ED1193ac36580A6e7B
- Governance: 0xc43d48E7FDA576C5022d0670B652A622E8caD041
- IFRLock: 0x769928aBDfc949D0718d8766a1C2d7dBb63954Eb
- BurnReserve: 0xaA1496133B6c274190A2113410B501C5802b6fCF
- BuybackVault: 0x670D293e3D65f96171c10DdC8d88B96b0570F812
- PartnerVault: 0xc6eb7714bCb035ebc2D4d9ba7B3762ef7B9d4F7D
- FeeRouterV1: 0x4807B77B2E25cD055DA42B09BA4d0aF9e580C60a
- Vesting: 0x2694Bc84e8D5251E9E4Ecd4B2Ae3f866d6106271
- LiquidityReserve: 0xdc0309804803b3A105154f6073061E3185018f64
- BootstrapVaultV3: 0xf72565C4cDB9575c9D3aEE6B9AE3fDBd7F56e141
- BuilderRegistry: 0xdfe6636DA47F8949330697e1dC5391267CEf0EE3

## Phase 3 Contracts (planned — after Bootstrap ends June 2026)

- CommitmentVault — Voluntary token lock with 4 unlock conditions (time, price, time+price, time OR price). Anti-dump mechanism for contributors.
- LendingVault — IFR lending against ETH collateral (200% initial, 150% margin call, 120% liquidation). Creates buy pressure via loan repayments.
- BuybackController — Automated fee distribution from FeeRouterV1 to BuybackVault + BurnReserve.
